topIssues.issue: No figma_search_components fallback for missing sub-components — goes straight to placeholder. No figma_get_design_system_kit degradation. Heavy engineering jargon.
topIssues.fix: Add search-based resolution before placeholder. Add graceful degradation. Reduce API jargon in user-facing output.

topIssues.issue: On-demand extraction design means no individual JSONs produced upfront. No fault tolerance for partial failures. No dependency ordering. No resumability.
topIssues.fix: Add fault tolerance (try/catch per component). Add dependency-aware ordering. Add checkpoint/resume mechanism.

topIssues.issue: State matrix is generic not per-field. No specific error messages. No interactive sub-features (password toggle, autocomplete). Asks 5 upfront questions.
topIssues.fix: Add per-field state documentation. Require specific error message strings. Add interactive extras section. Reduce questions to 2.

topIssues.issue: Asks 4-5 questions before work. No next-step guidance. Source differentiation at collection level only.
topIssues.fix: Reduce to 1-2 questions with escape hatches. Add 'Next: run /setup-components' guidance. Add per-token source field.

topIssues.issue: No dedicated temporal stress category — 'March 2019' stale data not reliably flagged.
topIssues.fix: Add explicit Temporal stress category with date staleness detection.

topIssues.issue: No loading/processing states between flow steps. Payment failure depth is shallow.
topIssues.fix: Add loading state requirement per transition. Expand error recovery patterns.

topIssues.issue: No usage disambiguation field. Tags from names only, not descriptions. No alternatives grouping.
topIssues.fix: Add primaryUse field. Parse descriptions for tags. Group similar icons with 'alternatives' field.
